title: Create hello_mcp.txt
description: Create a file named hello_mcp.txt in the project root and write a short greeting from the MCP task server into it.

title: Add demo note
description: Create a file named demo_note.md and add a short note explaining that this file was created by Cursor after reading a task from the MCP server.

title: Update README demo section
description: Add one short sentence to the README explaining that tasks can be fetched by Cursor through MCP.
